summary: More confident Nucleus AI answers plus copy and speak on the dashboard.

introduced: Copy and Speak buttons on Nucleus AI dashboard answers
changed: Nucleus AI reasoner uses Google Search grounding whenever retrieval is empty, not only for general-knowledge questions
Reasoner temperature raised to 0.55 for clearer, more confident answers
fixed: Nucleus AI no longer falls back to "not enough retrieved evidence" for factual questions when web search returns no results
